properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a love song rising up inside me. These feelings in my heart must be released. I feel so alive, I just can't help but sing About the One who makes my heart beat.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love living in love with Jesus. I love knowing that He loves me. He makes the sun shine in my heart When the way is dim. Oh, how I love living in love with Him!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His Presence is a treasure this world can't afford. Each day with Him is sweeter than before. He satisfies me, yet He makes me long for more Even in the sunshine and the storm.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He makes the sun shine in my heart When the way is dim Oh, how I love living in love Oh, how I love living in love Oh, how I love living in love with Him.
